# Chirag Vishnoi

> Official portfolio of Chirag Vishnoi — Full Stack Web Developer, React Developer, & WordPress Wizard.

This file provides a structured index of the website contents and developer information for AI search agents and Large Language Models.

## Primary Resources
- [Portfolio Homepage](https://chiragvishnoi-01.github.io/): The main portfolio landing page containing the full 3D interactive experience.
- [LinkedIn Connect](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chiragvishnoi01/): Professional network, workspace details, and community contributions.
- [GitHub Repositories](https://github.com/chiragvishnoi-01): Source code, open-source projects, and developer contributions.

## Active Projects & Missions
- [Raktchain Platform](https://raktchain.vercel.app/): Decentralized blood donation network bridging the gap between donors and recipients. Built using React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Tailwind CSS.
- [ENGENIOUS '26 Web Portal](https://engenirous26.vercel.app/): The official website for the Techno-Cultural Fest of Kanpur Institute of Technology, Kanpur.

## Professional Experience
- [Kanpur AI Profile](https://chiragvishnoi-01.github.io/#experience): Details of building web platforms and meetups for local AI developer communities.
- [NSOC Technical Lead](https://chiragvishnoi-01.github.io/#experience): Experience managing open-source repositories and conducting secure development workshops.
- [Freelance Works](https://chiragvishnoi-01.github.io/#experience): Delivery details for custom responsive client applications and themes.
